risk_factors: Net interest margin compression as deposit beta rises
Litigation reserve build for legacy mortgage origination
Unrealized losses in held-to-maturity Treasury portfolio
Regulatory scrutiny on overdraft and NSF fees
company.ai_summary: Visa Inc. screens as Elevated risk: a softening top-line and 9 normalized complaints/quarter suggest customer-facing friction is compounding. The 1-event 8-K cadence over 90 days warrants close monitoring around the upcoming filing window.
